name: AVALON HOLDINGS CORP
business: Avalon operates in two segments: waste management services (including hazardous/nonhazardous waste disposal brokerage, captive landfill management, and salt water injection well operations) and golf and related operations (including golf courses, country clubs, a hotel, fitness centers, tennis courts, salon and spa, dining, banquet, and conference facilities). The waste management services segment serves industrial, commercial, municipal, and governmental customers primarily in selected northeastern and midwestern United States markets. The golf and related operations segment generates revenue from membership dues, greens fees, cart rentals, merchandise, food and beverage sales, room rentals, and other resort amenities.

exposures.sentence: The waste management services segment includes waste disposal brokerage and management services, captive landfill management operations and salt water injection well operations.

catalysts.event: Legal proceedings regarding salt water injection well AWMS #2; multiple appeals ongoing
catalysts.sentence: On October 31, 2024 the Franklin County Ohio Court of Common Pleas dismissed the appeal. The Company appealed the dismissal to the Ohio 10th District Court of Appeals on November 26, 2024.
